summary: Spec review accepts the bounded Harbor local website identity environment model for FR #157.
reviewed_validation_summary: `pnpm typecheck`; `pnpm test` (17 tests); `pnpm smoke:runtime`; `git diff --check`; `loom verify --target . --json`; `loom fact-chain --target . --json`; `loom suite validate --target . --item HARBOR-161 --json`; `loom suite evidence validate --target . --item HARBOR-161 --json`; `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item HARBOR-161 --json`; and `loom build --target . --item HARBOR-161 --build-evidence .loom/specs/HARBOR-161/build-evidence.json --json` passed locally. Hosted py-compile, demo-bootstrap, repo-local-cli, and loom-check passed on PR #186 run 28771310582.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: The spec keeps Harbor as local identity environment/runtime owner and excludes cloud account hosting, team password vaults, live login automation, CAPTCHA/2FA bypass, App/Core/Lode contracts, and raw private material export.

implementation_review_disposition.reason: Implementation is limited to runtime-api model/tests/smoke and item-specific carrier.
